lemma_statement.name: restricted_continuation_restricted_integration_by_parts_discharge_lemma
lemma_statement.claim: On the restricted-continuation region, the restricted integration-by-parts identity is certified whenever the explicitly listed interior regularity, trace existence, normal-trace existence, boundary-flux pairing, and orientation compatibility hypotheses are supplied.

required_inputs.name: state_spatial_regularitiy_on_restricted_region
required_inputs.role: supplies the interior spatial regularity required for integration by parts

required_inputs.name: restricted_continuation_boundary_trace_exists
required_inputs.role: supplies the scalar boundary trace on partial Sigma_R

required_inputs.name: restricted_continuation_normal_trace_exists
required_inputs.role: supplies the normal trace on partial Sigma_R

required_inputs.name: restricted_continuation_boundary_flux_pairing_exists
required_inputs.role: supplies the certified boundary flux pairing term

required_inputs.name: restricted_boundary_orientation_matches_divergence_theorem
required_inputs.role: ensures the boundary term has the same orientation as the restricted divergence theorem

required_inputs.name: interior_boundary_decomposition_has_no_uncontrolled_remainder
required_inputs.role: ensures the restricted region produces only certified interior and partial Sigma_R boundary terms

discharged_obligations: Separates restricted integration by parts from boundary trace existence.
Separates restricted integration by parts from normal trace existence.
Separates restricted integration by parts from boundary flux pairing and coercivity.
Certifies the exact assumptions under which the restricted-continuation integration-by-parts identity is available.
Promotes restricted integration by parts from an undischarged target obligation to a conditional discharge lemma.
non_claims: Does not prove the energy identity.
Does not prove the energy inequality.
Does not prove continuation or contradiction.
Does not prove full RR closure.
